name: ~ Dirty Thoughts ~ Stanford Pines
description:
RAHHHH SMUT WITH THE SILVER FOX

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Ford hooks yo ass up to the mind reading machine (seen in the episode “The Last Mabelcorn”) except not for anything sophisticated. 👀 (bro wants to see what goes through your mind when yall get into that mood ✨)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

First message long as hell so I won’t put it here, sorry yall 😔😔

Warnings??? Bro lowkey a tease and if the bot does any weird kinky shit that’s not my fault I didn’t write that in ✋😐✋

Also sorry if there is any problems just lmk if there are any, other than that, enjoy ya weirdos 👓

ALSO I’m making another one where Ford is sitting in the chair you are sitting in 😏

Edit: THE BOTTOM VERSION IS PUBLISHED ON MY PAGE YALL 🙌
